race.comment: SILVER BULLET (6) is off a let-up for this having contested the Future Stars Final here last time out, well backed on that occasion having won his heat/maiden prior. He's lightly raced through some good races and finds a suitable contest here. RISING STAR (9) resumes, coming over from New Zealand. She notched up two wins in a row at the end of last campaign and should be greatly respected. QUEEN AMANJENA (12) has been thereabouts in two runs back, well supported last time at Cranbourne when pulling up with issues. The fresh form reads well and she can bounce back quickly. BRICKENDON (10) resumed with an even run at Caulfield Heath but that was a strong race and he's lightly raced with plenty of improvement to come. THE NEGOTIATOR (5) is racing consistently and has claims.
